name: dev-kit-compliance
description: Validate and improve repositories for the 'Repo-as-a-Skill' standard. Audits for TDD, 12-factor principles, and AI-ready context layers.

sections.title: Compliance Pillars
bullets: Context Layer: Internal documentation and task history.
AI Interface: Skill mapping and MCP definitions.
